fa-glass-empty.appearanceId: a tall cylindrical tumbler outline with straight or slightly tapered walls and no contents inside; plain empty drinking glass silhouette with an open top and no liquid fill
fa-glass-empty.functionalityId: marks a drink container as empty or depleted; indicates a beverage slot with nothing in it
fa-glass-empty.intentId: track an empty glass or beverage vessel; indicate that a drink order needs to be refilled

fa-glass-half.appearanceId: a tall cylindrical tumbler with the lower half filled and the upper half empty showing a horizontal liquid fill line at mid-height; drinking glass silhouette with a partial fill level at roughly fifty percent
fa-glass-half.functionalityId: displays a half-full or half-empty level indicator; represents a partial quantity or midpoint fill state
fa-glass-half.intentId: indicate a partial fill or midpoint level; track a beverage or container that is approximately half full

fa-glass-martini.appearanceId: a wide inverted-triangle bowl on a slender stem with a flat circular base; classic V-shaped cocktail glass silhouette with a long thin stem and a broad open rim
fa-glass-martini.functionalityId: represents a cocktail or martini drink in a menu or bar app; marks a bar category or alcohol beverage option
fa-glass-martini.intentId: find cocktail or martini drink options; access a bar menu or alcoholic beverage section

fa-glass-water.appearanceId: a tall cylindrical tumbler with a full or nearly full liquid fill line near the top and straight walls; plain drinking glass silhouette filled with water almost to the brim
fa-glass-water.functionalityId: represents a water glass or hydration item in a menu or health app; marks a beverage order as plain water
fa-glass-water.intentId: order or track a glass of water; indicate a hydration or water consumption item

fa-glass-water-droplet.appearanceId: a tall cylindrical tumbler with a water droplet shape overlaid above or beside it; drinking glass silhouette combined with a teardrop water drop symbol
fa-glass-water-droplet.functionalityId: represents water hydration or a glass of water with a droplet indicator; marks a water drink option with a hydration badge
fa-glass-water-droplet.intentId: track water intake or hydration; indicate a water beverage option in a health or menu app

fa-glass-whiskey.appearanceId: a short wide tumbler or rocks glass with thick walls and a broad flat base; squat cylindrical lowball glass silhouette with a wide opening and substantial base
fa-glass-whiskey.functionalityId: represents a whiskey on the rocks or neat spirits drink; marks a spirits or whiskey category in a bar or restaurant menu
fa-glass-whiskey.intentId: find whiskey or neat spirits drink options; access a whiskey or spirits section in a bar menu app

fa-glasses.appearanceId: two circular lens frames connected by a central nose bridge with side temples extending outward; eyeglasses silhouette with twin round lenses joined at the center and arms on each side
fa-glasses.functionalityId: activates a reading or accessibility mode with magnified text; represents vision correction or eyewear in a profile or health context
fa-glasses.intentId: adjust display for readability or vision assistance; indicate eyewear or vision-related content in a profile

fa-glasses-alt.appearanceId: two rectangular or squared lens frames connected by a nose bridge with side arms; eyeglasses silhouette with twin rectangular lenses and a bridge piece linking them at the center
fa-glasses-alt.functionalityId: activates a reading or vision mode with an alternate lens style; represents rectangular-framed eyewear in a profile or optical context
fa-glasses-alt.intentId: indicate an alternate eyewear style or reading mode; access vision or optical settings in a profile app

fa-globe.appearanceId: a sphere with curved latitude and longitude grid lines forming a classic world map outline; round globe silhouette with horizontal and vertical arc lines representing parallels and meridians
fa-globe.functionalityId: switches the interface language or region setting; navigates to an international or worldwide section
fa-globe.intentId: change language or region preferences; access global or international content

fa-globe-pointer.appearanceId: a sphere with latitude and longitude grid lines and a cursor pointer arrow overlaid pointing at the surface; globe silhouette with a mouse cursor or hand pointer badge touching the sphere
fa-globe-pointer.functionalityId: selects a location or region on a globe or map; interacts with a geographic point on a world view
fa-globe-pointer.intentId: choose a location or country on a global map; point to a specific geographic region in a world selector

fa-globe-snow.appearanceId: a sphere with latitude and longitude grid lines and a snowflake symbol overlaid at the center or top; globe silhouette with a crystalline snowflake badge indicating cold or winter conditions
fa-globe-snow.functionalityId: indicates winter weather conditions across a global region; marks a location or region as experiencing cold or snowy climate
fa-globe-snow.intentId: check global winter weather or cold climate regions; filter locations by snowy or cold conditions on a world map

fa-globe-stand.appearanceId: a sphere with latitude and longitude arc lines mounted on a curved ring and a pedestal base stand; globe silhouette with a tilted axis ring and a supporting base beneath
fa-globe-stand.functionalityId: represents a desktop globe or world geography reference; navigates to a geography or world atlas section
fa-globe-stand.intentId: access world geography or atlas content; reference global locations using a desktop globe view

fa-globe-wifi.appearanceId: a sphere with latitude and longitude grid lines and a wifi signal arc symbol overlaid at the top; globe silhouette with a curved wireless signal badge above it
fa-globe-wifi.functionalityId: indicates global internet connectivity or worldwide wireless access; represents an international network or wifi coverage area
fa-globe-wifi.intentId: check global internet or wifi availability; access worldwide connectivity settings or coverage information

fa-goal-net.appearanceId: a rectangular sports goal frame with a net of crisscrossing diagonal lines filling the back and sides; open-fronted goal post outline with a grid mesh pattern inside representing a soccer or hockey net
fa-goal-net.functionalityId: marks a goal scored or a scoring event in a sports tracker; navigates to a sports goal or scoring section
fa-goal-net.intentId: record or track a goal in a sports game; access scoring or goal-related sports content

fa-golf-ball.appearanceId: a small circle with a dimpled surface texture shown as multiple small dots or indentations across the sphere; round ball silhouette with a stippled dimple pattern covering its surface
fa-golf-ball.functionalityId: marks a golf sport category or golf course location; represents a golf game or ball in a sports app
fa-golf-ball.intentId: find golf courses or golf-related content; track a golf game or ball position

fa-golf-club.appearanceId: a long thin shaft tapering down to a flat angled club head at the bottom; golf club silhouette with a slender handle and a wedge or iron head at the lower end
fa-golf-club.functionalityId: marks a golf sport category or represents a golf club or equipment item; navigates to a golf gear or equipment section
fa-golf-club.intentId: access golf equipment or gear information; find golf club options or sporting goods in a golf app

fa-golf-flag-hole.appearanceId: a cylindrical hole opening in the ground with a flagstick and triangular pennant flag mounted in the center; circular cup cutout silhouette with a vertical pole and a small triangular flag at the top
fa-golf-flag-hole.functionalityId: marks a hole location on a golf course map or scorecard; represents a golf hole or pin position in a golf app
fa-golf-flag-hole.intentId: navigate to a specific hole on a golf course; track hole positions or golf pin locations in a scorecard app

fa-gopuram.appearanceId: a tall tiered tower structure with multiple diminishing horizontal tiers decorated with ornate carvings narrowing to a pointed top; temple gateway silhouette with stacked ornamental tiers and a tapering summit
fa-gopuram.functionalityId: marks a Hindu temple site or gopuram architectural landmark on a map; represents South Indian temple architecture in a travel or heritage app
fa-gopuram.intentId: find Hindu temple sites or South Indian architectural landmarks; access travel or heritage content featuring gopuram towers

fa-gramophone.appearanceId: a vintage record player with a large flared horn speaker on top, a rotating turntable disc below, and a tonearm with a stylus; antique phonograph silhouette with an oversized bell-shaped horn and a platter base
fa-gramophone.functionalityId: represents vintage or retro music playback; navigates to a classic or old-fashioned music or audio section
fa-gramophone.intentId: access vintage music or retro audio content; indicate a classic or antique sound format in a music app

fa-grapes.appearanceId: a cluster of small circles arranged in a triangular bunch tapering to a point at the bottom with a small stem and leaf at the top; grape bunch silhouette with multiple round berries in a stacked pyramid formation
fa-grapes.functionalityId: marks a grape or vineyard category in a food or wine app; represents fruit or wine-related content
fa-grapes.intentId: find grape, wine, or vineyard content; browse fruit or wine options in a food or beverage app

fa-grate.appearanceId: a flat rectangular surface with a repeating grid of parallel horizontal and vertical lines forming small square openings; flat grill grate silhouette with a uniform mesh of evenly spaced crossing bars
fa-grate.functionalityId: represents a ventilation grate, drain cover, or cooking grill surface; marks a filtration or airflow element in an HVAC or cooking context
fa-grate.intentId: indicate a ventilation, drainage, or grill surface; access HVAC or cooking grate-related content

fa-grate-droplet.appearanceId: a flat rectangular grate mesh surface with a water droplet or teardrop shape overlaid above or below it; grid grate silhouette combined with a falling droplet symbol
fa-grate-droplet.functionalityId: represents a draining or water-filtration grate surface; indicates liquid passing through a grate or drain
fa-grate-droplet.intentId: indicate a drainage or water filtration grate; track water flow or drainage through a grated surface

fa-greater-than.appearanceId: a single right-pointing angle bracket or chevron formed by two diagonal lines meeting at a rightward apex; angular greater-than mathematical symbol with two diagonal strokes forming a V pointing right
fa-greater-than.functionalityId: inserts a greater-than comparison operator in a formula or code expression; indicates that one value exceeds another
fa-greater-than.intentId: compare two values where the left exceeds the right; insert a greater-than operator in a math or code expression

fa-greater-than-equal.appearanceId: a right-pointing angle bracket above a horizontal straight line; greater-than-or-equal-to mathematical symbol with a chevron over a flat underline stroke
fa-greater-than-equal.functionalityId: inserts a greater-than-or-equal-to comparison operator in a formula or code; indicates a value is at least as large as another
fa-greater-than-equal.intentId: compare two values where the left is greater than or equal to the right; insert a greater-than-or-equal operator in a math or logic expression

fa-grid.appearanceId: a three-by-three arrangement of nine equally sized square cells with thin dividing lines; uniform square grid of nine cells in a three-column by three-row layout
fa-grid.functionalityId: switches the view to a grid layout; displays content items in a structured multi-column grid
fa-grid.intentId: view content in a grid layout; toggle a display to a structured tile or grid arrangement

fa-grid-2.appearanceId: a two-by-two arrangement of four equally sized square cells with thin dividing lines; uniform square grid of four cells in a two-column by two-row layout
fa-grid-2.functionalityId: switches the view to a four-cell grid layout; displays content items in a compact two-by-two tile arrangement
fa-grid-2.intentId: view content in a compact four-cell grid; toggle a display to a two-by-two tile layout

fa-grid-2-plus.appearanceId: a two-by-two arrangement of four equally sized square cells with a small plus badge overlaid in the corner or center; four-cell square grid with an addition symbol indicating an addable tile
fa-grid-2-plus.functionalityId: adds a new tile or item to a two-by-two grid layout; extends a four-cell grid with an additional cell
fa-grid-2-plus.intentId: add a new item or tile to a four-cell grid layout; expand a two-by-two grid by inserting a new cell

fa-grid-4.appearanceId: a four-by-four arrangement of sixteen equally sized square cells with thin dividing lines; dense square grid of sixteen cells in a four-column by four-row layout
fa-grid-4.functionalityId: switches the view to a sixteen-cell grid layout; displays content in a fine four-by-four tile arrangement
fa-grid-4.intentId: view content in a dense sixteen-cell grid; toggle to a four-by-four tile display layout

fa-grid-5.appearanceId: a five-by-five arrangement of twenty-five equally sized square cells with thin dividing lines; dense square grid of twenty-five cells in a five-column by five-row layout
fa-grid-5.functionalityId: switches the view to a twenty-five-cell grid layout; displays content in a fine five-by-five tile arrangement
fa-grid-5.intentId: view content in a dense twenty-five-cell grid; toggle to a five-by-five tile display layout

fa-grid-dividers.appearanceId: a grid of square cells with bold or thicker dividing lines between groups of cells creating visible partition rows or columns; rectangular cell grid with emphasized separator lines splitting sections
fa-grid-dividers.functionalityId: displays a grid with section dividers separating groups of cells; applies visible partition lines to a structured grid layout
fa-grid-dividers.intentId: organize a grid into sections with visible dividers; view a structured grid with clear partition lines between groups

fa-grid-horizontal.appearanceId: several horizontal rows of equally sized rectangular or square cells stacked vertically with thin dividing lines between rows; wide horizontal-band grid silhouette with rows of cells running left to right
fa-grid-horizontal.functionalityId: switches the view to a horizontal row-based grid layout; arranges content in horizontal bands or rows of cells
fa-grid-horizontal.intentId: view content in a horizontal row grid arrangement; toggle to a row-oriented cell layout

fa-grid-round.appearanceId: a three-by-three arrangement of nine equally sized rounded-corner square cells with thin dividing lines; uniform grid of nine pill-cornered cells in a three-column by three-row layout
fa-grid-round.functionalityId: switches the view to a rounded nine-cell grid layout; displays content in a soft-cornered three-by-three tile arrangement
fa-grid-round.intentId: view content in a rounded-corner nine-cell grid; toggle to a soft three-by-three tile display

fa-grid-round-2.appearanceId: a two-by-two arrangement of four equally sized rounded-corner square cells; uniform grid of four pill-cornered cells in a two-column by two-row layout
fa-grid-round-2.functionalityId: switches the view to a rounded four-cell grid layout; displays content in a soft-cornered two-by-two tile arrangement
fa-grid-round-2.intentId: view content in a rounded four-cell grid layout; toggle to a soft two-by-two tile display

fa-grid-round-2-plus.appearanceId: a two-by-two arrangement of four rounded-corner square cells with a small plus badge overlaid; four pill-cornered grid cells with an addition symbol indicating an addable tile
fa-grid-round-2-plus.functionalityId: adds a new tile to a rounded four-cell grid layout; extends a two-by-two rounded grid with an additional cell
fa-grid-round-2-plus.intentId: add a new item or tile to a rounded four-cell grid; expand a soft two-by-two grid by inserting a new cell

fa-grid-round-4.appearanceId: a four-by-four arrangement of sixteen equally sized rounded-corner square cells with thin dividing lines; dense grid of sixteen pill-cornered cells in a four-column by four-row layout
fa-grid-round-4.functionalityId: switches the view to a rounded sixteen-cell grid layout; displays content in a soft-cornered four-by-four tile arrangement
fa-grid-round-4.intentId: view content in a rounded sixteen-cell grid; toggle to a soft four-by-four tile display layout

fa-grid-round-5.appearanceId: a five-by-five arrangement of twenty-five equally sized rounded-corner square cells with thin dividing lines; dense grid of twenty-five pill-cornered cells in a five-column by five-row layout
fa-grid-round-5.functionalityId: switches the view to a rounded twenty-five-cell grid layout; displays content in a soft-cornered five-by-five tile arrangement
fa-grid-round-5.intentId: view content in a rounded twenty-five-cell grid; toggle to a soft five-by-five tile display layout

fa-grill.appearanceId: a round or rectangular barbecue grill body with a lid on top, a grate surface, and four or three supporting legs; outdoor BBQ grill silhouette with a domed cover, cooking surface, and leg supports
fa-grill.functionalityId: marks a grilling or barbecue cooking category in a food or recipe app; represents an outdoor grill or BBQ activity
fa-grill.intentId: find grilling or barbecue recipes; access outdoor cooking or BBQ-related content in a food app

fa-grill-fire.appearanceId: a round barbecue grill body with legs and a flame or fire symbol rising from the grill surface or emerging from beneath; BBQ grill silhouette with an active flame overlay indicating it is lit and hot
fa-grill-fire.functionalityId: indicates an active or lit grill with fire; marks a barbecue as currently heating or in use
fa-grill-fire.intentId: indicate an active barbecue or lit grill; start or track a grilling session with open fire

fa-grill-hot.appearanceId: a round barbecue grill body with legs and heat wave lines or wavy heat shimmer marks rising above the grill surface; BBQ grill silhouette with undulating heat lines above indicating high temperature
fa-grill-hot.functionalityId: indicates a hot or preheated grill ready for cooking; marks a grill as at optimal cooking temperature
fa-grill-hot.intentId: indicate that a grill is hot and ready for cooking; monitor grill temperature or readiness status

fa-grimace.appearanceId: a round face outline with two oval eyes, rosy or shaded cheeks, and a wide clenched-teeth grin showing a row of straight teeth; circular emoticon with large eyes, visible cheek blush, and a broad strained toothy smile
fa-grimace.functionalityId: expresses awkwardness, nervousness, or an uncomfortable reaction in a message; inserts a grimacing or cringe emoji
fa-grimace.intentId: convey awkwardness or discomfort in a chat message; react with a grimacing or nervous face expression

fa-grin.appearanceId: a round face outline with two open oval or arc-shaped eyes and a broad wide open-mouth smile showing teeth; circular emoticon with simple dot or arc eyes and a large toothy grin
fa-grin.functionalityId: expresses happiness or excitement in a message; inserts a broadly grinning or happy face emoji
fa-grin.intentId: convey happiness or excitement in a chat; react with a broadly grinning or cheerful face

fa-grin-alt.appearanceId: a round face outline with two raised arc or squinting-with-joy eyes and a very wide open-mouth toothy grin; circular emoticon with upward-curved happy eyes and an extremely broad teeth-showing smile
fa-grin-alt.functionalityId: expresses exaggerated happiness or delight in a message; inserts an alternate broadly grinning emoji with joyful squinting eyes
fa-grin-alt.intentId: convey exaggerated joy or delight in a chat; react with an alternate very happy grinning face

fa-grin-beam.appearanceId: a round face outline with two very wide arc-shaped squinting eyes and a broad toothy open-mouth smile; circular emoticon with deeply curved squinted eyes showing joy and a large beaming teeth-filled grin
fa-grin-beam.functionalityId: expresses beaming joy or intense happiness in a message; inserts a broad-beaming grin emoji with squinting eyes
fa-grin-beam.intentId: convey intense happiness or elation in a chat; react with a beaming wide-grin face with squinted eyes

fa-grin-beam-sweat.appearanceId: a round face outline with squinting arc eyes, a broad beaming toothy grin, and a single sweat droplet on the forehead or side of the face; circular emoticon with joyful squinted eyes, a wide smile, and a sweat drop badge
fa-grin-beam-sweat.functionalityId: expresses relieved happiness or nervous excitement in a message; inserts a grinning with sweat emoji suggesting anxious relief
fa-grin-beam-sweat.intentId: convey nervous relief or anxious happiness in a chat; react with a sweating grin face suggesting an awkward or tense situation resolved happily

fa-grin-hearts.appearanceId: a round face outline with two heart shapes in place of the eyes and a broad open-mouth toothy grin; circular emoticon with heart-shaped pupils and a large smiling mouth expressing adoration
fa-grin-hearts.functionalityId: expresses love, adoration, or infatuation in a message; inserts a heart-eyes grinning emoji
fa-grin-hearts.intentId: convey love or adoration in a chat message; react with a heart-eyes grin expressing deep affection

fa-grin-squint.appearanceId: a round face outline with two very narrowed or tightly squinted eyes and a wide open-mouth toothy grin; circular emoticon with tiny slit or arc eyes and a broad laughing smile
fa-grin-squint.functionalityId: expresses intense laughter or amusement in a message; inserts a squinting with laughter emoji
fa-grin-squint.intentId: convey intense amusement or laughter in a chat; react with a squinting laugh face expression

fa-grin-squint-tears.appearanceId: a round face outline with tightly squinted eyes, tears of joy streaming from both eyes, and a very wide toothy grin; circular emoticon with slit eyes, tear drop marks at the eye corners, and an open laughing mouth
fa-grin-squint-tears.functionalityId: expresses rolling laughter or tears of joy in a message; inserts a laughing-until-crying squint emoji
fa-grin-squint-tears.intentId: convey uncontrollable laughter or extreme amusement in a chat; react with a tears-of-joy squinting face

fa-grin-stars.appearanceId: a round face outline with two star shapes in place of the eyes and a broad open-mouth toothy grin; circular emoticon with star-shaped pupils and a wide excited smile expressing wonder or amazement
fa-grin-stars.functionalityId: expresses awe, excitement, or being starstruck in a message; inserts a star-eyes grinning emoji
fa-grin-stars.intentId: convey amazement or being starstruck in a chat; react with a star-eyes grin expressing excitement or wonder
